summary: An unreviewed upstream is invisible technical debt — every adoption, fork, or pin of external code runs a governed protocol, is decided by the human authority, and is captured as an ADR before code lands.

rules.rule: Before adopting, installing, forking, or integrating any substantial third-party dependency, run the 6-step Adoption Protocol, obtain an explicit decision from the consuming repo's human authority, and write the decision as an ADR before any code lands.

watch.note: declared unwatched — no gate cites this canon yet; growth candidate

rules.rule: Strong-copyleft (AGPL/GPL) code never enters the repo as a fork or copy — not even one function; it may only be studied for patterns reimplemented from scratch or consumed across a network boundary as an external service.

watch.note: declared unwatched — no gate cites this canon yet; growth candidate

rules.rule: Document every skipped upstream version in the baseline-versions doc with package, versions, decision, date, and reason — only 'I looked and decided to skip because X' is a valid skip; an undocumented skip is a finding.

watch.note: declared unwatched — no gate cites this canon yet; growth candidate

rules.rule: Security patches are obligatory without negotiation, per the severity policy: Critical/High CVE same day (overriding every other rule), Medium within one week, Low at the next monthly review.

watch.note: declared unwatched — no gate cites this canon yet; growth candidate

rules.rule: Never mix updates of multiple upstream repos in a single PR — one update per PR, merged only with a green build and passing test suite, with the baseline doc updated in the same PR.

watch.note: declared unwatched — no gate cites this canon yet; growth candidate

rules.rule: Every external (Typology B/C) provider carries a security grade, and grade F blocks all integration work — set on discovery for automatic triggers, recorded and committed immediately as a governance event, with return only via the governed reinstatement path (remediation, confirmation, independent verification, authority approval, probation at grade C).

watch.note: declared unwatched — no gate cites this canon yet; growth candidate
